expectations.evidence: Per-Rule Assessment section covers all 11 rules individually (1. anti-drift through 11. slide-rules).

expectations.text: Produces a compliance matrix with status per rule
expectations.evidence: Executive summary table + detailed per-rule assessment with COMPLIANT / PARTIALLY COMPLIANT / STALE.

expectations.text: Identifies at least 1 stale or outdated rule element
expectations.evidence: design-reference.md has pending expansions (E21, RETRACTED status, chroma floor). Also notes Living HTML architectural shift not reflected in rules.

expectations.text: Identifies at least 1 gap (error pattern with no covering rule)
expectations.evidence: Identifies gap: 'rules did NOT keep pace with the evidence-first / Living HTML architectural shift (S46-S49), creating a growing disconnect'.
Cross-references against 'git history (156 commits, 53 sessions), hooks, CLAUDE.md, HANDOFF.md, CHANGELOG.md, and actual file structure'.

expectations.text: Does NOT auto-modify any rule files
expectations.evidence: Report saved to workspace only. No Edit/Write to .claude/rules/.

expectations.text: Proposes concrete updates for stale/gap rules
expectations.evidence: Each finding has concrete recommendations with specific text suggestions.
